package repository

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for wide_select_query: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Literal SELECT * query shapes.
type CaseWideSelectQueryDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseWideSelectQueryModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseWideSelectQueryRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseWideSelectQueryModel
}

type CaseWideSelectQueryService struct {
    repo *CaseWideSelectQueryRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseWideSelectQueryAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveWideSelectQuery(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseWideSelectQueryDTO) error {
    focus := "wide_select_query"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    for _, item := range items {
        var rows []CaseWideSelectQueryModel
        db.Raw("SELECT * FROM work_items WHERE tenant_id = ?", item.TenantID).Scan(&rows)
    }
    wide_select_query_positive := map[string]int{"wide": 1, "select": 2, "query": 3}
    wide_select_query_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    wide_positive_0 := wide_select_query_positive["wide"] + len(input)
    _ = wide_positive_0
    select_positive_1 := wide_select_query_positive["select"] + len(input)
    _ = select_positive_1
    query_positive_2 := db.Where("query_id = ?", input)
    _ = query_positive_2
    return nil
}
